feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to use Greek alphabet letters when entering Greek National ID information,
entry.content:
Not able to update Greece alphabets in Greece National ID Portlet.  Kindly help me if any has configured this. 

Thanks in advance..

entry.title: Can we permission the Self Description feature in Spotlight?
entry.content:
Good day, 

Can we consider making the Self Description feature in Spotlight manageable through RBP? SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Employee Profile  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 

Such an open text box for employees creates room for anything to be entered that can be in violation and controversial. 

Making the feature manageable through permissions will help companies deter any situations of controversy. 

Regards,

Sean

entry.title: How to add wt 1630 to box 11 of w2 in sap need help on this
Remove directDeposit in Manage Business Configuration- SAP Successfactors Employee Central
entry.content:
******   Need Urgent inputs in this,  Someone Please help- Even SAP is taking lot of time *********

 

Hello Everyone-

I need to remove HRIS element  directDeposit from Manage Business Configuration ,. I followed KBA- https://me.sap.com/notes/0003226847 . I removed the code from Succession Data model. But still its not working . It still shows in MBCUI

Please let me know as how this element can be removed.

entry.title: Two new hire data in position after moving the candidate from MPH to EC
entry.content:
Hello all , 

 

When a candidate move from onboarding manage pending hire to EC with few changes in position and hire date in MPH , after moved to EC noticed that having a two new hire event in position with one empty data and changed data.

please do let me know possible way to avoid this issue?

Thanks and regards,

Dhanush Kumar

entry.title: Error when synchronizing to incumbent of one position in Manage position, but not in Manage data
entry.content:
An error occurred while synchronizing the changes to the incumbent of position (x). Neither the position nor the incumbent have been updated. Detailed error: No event reason or event found for user (x).

System shows this error when we try to change higher level position from certain future date in Manage position. (Manage position - insert new record - change higher level position)

When we make the same change in Manage data (Manage data - position - insert new record - change Higher level position) system accepts the change and it creates new record on the position and also on Job Information portlet (Supervisor change).

This happens only on one position in the system. We managed to change 10 other positions, from manage position, added them the same higher level position and it changed their supervisor accordingly in Job Info portlet.

There seems to be an issue with this position, or use

entry.title: Cost Center Replication from S/4 Hana Public Cloud to SuccessFactors via MDI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are implementing Cost Center Replication from S4 Public Cloud to SuccessFactors via Master Data Integration (MDI), we have Completed the configuration in S/4 Hana Public Cloud including Creating Communication Arrangements, Communication System, Communication User and Destination for S/4 HANA in SAP BTP Cockpit which works fine.

However, When Creating a Distribution Model via Manage Distribution Model for Cost Center, why does the Consumer Activation Status show as Inactive when MDI is selected.

Additionally when I Click on "Replicate" and initiate an Initial Replication in above Distribution Model, SAP S/4 HANA triggers to send data to MDI, and it shows as successful in Monitoring with below Note.

Objects have been sent to MDI (run id 5). Awaiting Response.

To verify if the data is reached to MDI, I have Checked Log/Events API Via Postman for Cost Center, there are no Logs available yet.

Can you assist in identifying any possible issues or errors we might have overlooked ?

Thanks,

Anil

entry.title: Hybrid Implementation Strategy - Manual (EC) and Best Practice (Recruiting) Pros and Cons
entry.content:
***extending this question to a broader audience, for your kind views and opinions or use-cases***

Hi Experts, 

What are the pros and cons of deploying a hybrid approach to the fast track the Build on DEV system, for a new business with Employee Central and Recruiting modules in view; 

  1. Employee Central - Manual implementation for the system build (No Best Practice Activation)
  2. Recruiting - Best Practice Activation and Tweaking to align to business requirements
  3. Integrations - EC Integration, Position Management (PM) and PM Integration will be manually configured - (No Best Practice Activation)
What are the risks to plan for in the scenario where the Recruiting module adopts the best practice approach but Employee Central is a manual configuration approach?

entry.title: Custom workflow email notification Issue with Header and HTML
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Customer is using Workflow to approve vacations in SuccessFactors, but my email company logo is far away from the text, also footer SuccessFactors logo is too far from text, and customer want it to be smaller blank space between Logos and email body text.

Example:

<Logo header>

 

<Body> Dear Employe etc...... </body>

 

<Logo footer>

 

Here for example we have two empty lines, and it should be one.

We tried using HTML in source part of email Template but blank space got even bigger.

Thanks a lot,

entry.title: Mass upload for status change on Manage workflow requests
entry.content:
Hello

We have over 2000 workflow requests in pending status and need to change to complete

Is there a process to do a mass upload for status change on workflow requests?

Thanks

entry.title: Talent Intelligent Hub implementation recommendations for new customers
entry.content:
Hi,

currently we are working with a new customer on his job architecture, skills catalog etc.

I´am wondering, if we should implement JPB with Center of Capabilities and OMP first (start with a limited scope), and at a later stage upgrade to TIH and perform all the migration and re-implementation steps?

Do you have any experience or recommendations based on your implementations?

Thank you & best regards

entry.title: Accumulation of non-recurring pay component amount over a year
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a yearly cap on non-recurring pay component amount. Kindly guide me on how to accumulate pay component amount over a year (every year), put checks to meet business requirement.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: When changing the supervisor, the position chart is updated, but some employees are not updated
entry.content: When changing the supervisor, the position chart is updated, but some employees are not updated in the person chart, while others are updated. What could be happening?

entry.title: Work Order ID - Contingent Worker
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently whenever we hire a contingent worker as Work Order is created for the first time, we generate Work Order ID and save it via business rule (onSave rule under Work Order). It simply checks if Work Order ID field is blank, if yes generate a Work Order ID based off a sequence. We have kept Work Order ID field as read only.

Now when we try to rehire the same Contingent Worker , as Work Order ID already exists for the employee , NO new Work Order is created and system keeps the same old Work Order ID and updates it.

To force system to generate a new Work Order ID for Rehire Contingent Worker I tried to enhance our existing business rule by adding some conditions around Rehire Contingent Worker Event Reason so that new Work Order ID gets generated for Rehired Contingent Worker cases. It did generate a new Work Order ID.

But this opens another issue – Post Rehiring of Contingent Worker whenever we try to edit a Work Order detail like Start \ End Date etc under Contingent Worker Information portlet, our enhanced rule will again run and as business rule’s new condition is true for Rehire Contingent Worker Event Reason , another new Work Order ID will be generated for same employee overwriting earlier Work Order ID.

Is there any way I can apply logic in the business rule so that New Work Order only gets created when we rehire Contingent worker and NOT when we try to edit any Work Order information under Contingent Worker Information portlet post Rehiring of Contingent Worker?

Appreciate everyone's inputs

entry.title: Subscribe (iCal) to SF EC Team Absence Calendar
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm relatively new to SuccessFactors and am seeking a specific functionality. In many HRIS platforms (such as Personio, Bamboo, or Workday), employees can subscribe to the Team Absence Calendar (equivalent named feature) via an iCal link. This allows them to view planned team absences directly in their preferred calendar app alongside their regular meetings.

I haven't been able to locate this option in SuccessFactors—does it exist?

entry.title: Delays or systems errors on SSFF due to Bank's Network
entry.content:
Hello all, 

We are facing on SSFF production, either delays or systems errors due to the fact that the users are allowed to login to SSFF via Citrix Bank's Network. 

Can anyone help with this if know what can be the root cause/fix?

Thanks

entry.title: SF Best practice to close yearly recurring time account type and run PEP job at the year end?
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Client needs to understand the best practice around yearly recurring time account type. We do have another time account type i.e. Carry Forward account which is valid for the first 3 months, interim update to be run at the start of the next year to update this account.

The main question is what would be the right time to run the PEP job for the recurring time account type at the year end keeping below scenarios in mind i.e. 

i) Pending leave approvals at the year end.  

ii) Pending leave approved that were not taken.  

iii) Leave not entered in December that was taken. 

PEP job to close the recurring time account type - what is the best practice around this i.e. when to run the job?

Do we it need to run on Jan 1st or Jan 2nd of the next year via PEP job run or Do we it need to run the job on Jan 15th i.e. during the mid of the first month in the next year. 

Any inputs would be appreciated. 

Thank you!

Regards,

Aditya

entry.title: How to delimit recurring pay components after employee termination via business rules in SF
entry.content:
We have a requirement to delimit recurring pay components for terminated employees so that there is no additional pay effective their termination date.

Is there any way we could achieve this via business rules in EC.

Or is there any way to restrict such payments in ECP which is the payroll system.

entry.title: Talent profile information (specifically career track) can be reported on in report stories?
entry.content:
I have been asked to create a story report that has career track fields listed in it from the talent profile. Is this possible in report stories? I am unable to find anything in the community related to career path reporting, but hoping to gain insight on what steps to take to be able to report on career track in Report Stories. 

Thank you in adavace for any help/input. 

Sincerely, 

Stephanie

entry.title: What are the Add ons in Employee Central?
entry.content:
We are implementing Employee Central. We have the requirement to use contingent workforce in the system as well. But I came to know standard EC do not handle the requirement and an additional component "SAP Fieldglass" would be installed as an add-on. 

Where can I get the list of Add-ons for Employee Central? Are these third party software?

#Fieldglass #Add-ons
